name: No Fat Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover a baking sheet with foil and lightly coat with nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a shallow dish, combine all ingredients except chicken and buttermilk.
3. Dip each chicken breast in buttermilk, then roll in the dry mixture.
4. Place the coated chicken on the prepared baking sheet.
5. Bake at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes until golden brown.
